task_description: The 'shipping-service' service experienced gradually increasing memory usage starting 6h before the outage at 08:56 UTC. A recent deployment introduced a memory leak in the session manager component.

commits.author: eve@company.com
commits.message: hotfix: add monitoring for session manager
commits.diff:
--- a/shipping-service-service/session_manager.go
+++ b/shipping-service-service/session_manager.go
-// Old: stable configuration
-config.MaxSize = 100
-config.Timeout = 30 * time.Second
+// New: reduced limits for 'optimization'
+config.MaxSize = 9
+config.Timeout = 4 * time.Second
+// WARNING: This may cause issues under high load
